parsed_review.summary: CP00-410 (RP13.P07.M03.S17-RP13.P07.M05.S12, Risk B, 40 units) is a clean descriptor-only payments slice (M03 tail 6 + M04 full 22 + M05 head 12) and passes read-only review. Scope is mutually consistent across the prompt baseline, registry.js binding/requirements/attestation, service.js builders, validators.js coverage/slice/hermes/claude/handoff validators, test/model.test.js, the contract projection, the validator script, manifest.json, command-evidence.json, and the live closeout-pack-plan.json — deliverable distribution {test:4,security_audit:4,hermes_evidence:3,claude_review:2,implementation:3,failure_recovery:23,fixture:1}=40 and micro-title split {Primary Implementation Slice:6,Secondary Workflow Slice:22,Permission And Audit Binding:12} match everywhere, and the source_ledger_sha agrees across baseline/manifest/plan. All 7 required exports exist and are imported; the validator does a deepEqual drift guard between the committed contract descriptor and the code-generated descriptor. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: every row enforces descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false, and the inherited no-write attestation keeps all dispatches_*/writes_*/persists_*, evaluates_runtime_permission, writes_audit_event, and emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false; production_ready=false with status implemented_pending_review (no overclaim). Authority boundary is respected: Claude remains a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob only), claude_is_final_approval=false, no enterprise-trust-from-local-validation claim, human approval gated for runtime opening. CP178+ hardening is enforced: forbidden_review_evidence covers auth-failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing-field cases; the auth preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON; summary_only_review_allowed=false is correctly set for a Risk B pack. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt descriptors with hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false. The unrelated untracked LDIP invalid-attempt file and other dirty files are correctly scoped out of this pack. No P0-P3 findings; does not block pack or goal closeout. Final enterprise-trust closure remains a human responsibility outside this receipt, as designed.
